originalAlarm.description: Branch condition evaluates to a garbage value

sanitizedDescription: Branch condition evaluates to a garbage value
model:
(define-fun CONFIG_MODULE_UNLOAD () Bool
  true)
(define-fun CONFIG_SMP () Bool
  true)
reasoning: Branch at 6e2b75740be.c L31 checks refptr(mod). In the MODULE_UNLOAD AND SMP path, mod was just assigned at L30 from list_entry (equivalent to allocation). refptr(mod) is always a valid dereference. The alarm claiming the branch condition is garbage is a false positive from the desugared analysis.
